info.name: Microsoft Azure Azure SQL Database API spec
info.description: The Azure SQL Database management API provides a RESTful set of web services that interact with Azure SQL Database services to manage your external server administrators.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Put Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Sql Servers Servername Administrators Administratorname

variable.description: (Required) Name of the server administrator resource.

request.description: Creates a new Server Active Directory Administrator or updates an existing server Active Directory Administrator.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Delete Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Sql Servers Servername Administrators Administratorname

variable.description: (Required) Name of the server administrator resource.

request.description: Deletes an existing server Active Directory Administrator.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Sql Servers Servername Administrators Administratorname

variable.description: (Required) Name of the server administrator resource.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Sql Servers Servername Administrators

request.description: Returns a list of server Administrators.
